description: Unifying bridge that maps three physics repos (thermodynamic-accountability-framework, earth-systems-physics, PhysicsGuard) to Rosetta-Shape-Core's merge policy, equation families, and sensing architecture. These repos provide the mathematical ground truth that validates family-shape merges and conservation law compliance.

TAF.name: thermodynamic-accountability-framework
TAF.description: Five foundational thermodynamic axioms. Energy accounting for biological and mechanical systems. Organism-agnostic — same physics regardless of substrate.

ESP.name: earth-systems-physics
ESP.description: 7-layer constraint pyramid (EM → magnetosphere → ionosphere → atmosphere → hydrosphere → lithosphere → biosphere). 50+ baseline state variables, 36 assumption boundaries, 8 feedback loops, 9 thresholds.

PG.name: PhysicsGuard
PG.description: Zero-dependency conservation law checker. CLEAN/SUSPECT/CORRUPTED verdicts with severity scoring. 50 reference premises, Landauer principle, scope-conditional truth.

merge_policy_validation.description: Maps each of family_map.json's 5 merge gates to specific validation endpoints across the three repos. When a family-shape merge is proposed, these validators provide the mathematical ground truth.

thermodynamic_consistency.description: Energy conservation (P02), entropy production, equilibrium conditions must hold without contradiction.

validators.check: total_load = (physical + cognitive) × hidden_mult × auto_mult × env_mult. If output exceeds input at any substrate, the merge violates axiom 1.
map_constraints() returns first_law_thermodynamics with lhs/rhs balance. Delta > tolerance = CORRUPTED.
Effective_Forcing = Storage + Feedback + Transport_Residual. Energy must be classified as INPUT, RESPONSE, or TRANSPORT with zero residual.

equation_compatibility.description: The family's substance equations must not produce contradictory results when evaluated in both shape contexts.

validators.check: Four-corner test: claim + negation + opposite + opposite-negation. If the merge claim passes all four corners, equations are compatible.
TF-IDF similarity against 50 reference premises. If the merge claim's nearest match is a VIOLATION category, flag for review.
CASCADE_MAP defines which layers can influence which. If the merge implies a coupling that contradicts the cascade topology, it's incompatible.

dimensional_consistency.description: Physical dimensions (units) must be preserved across the merge.

validators.check: TCL translates domain-specific measurements into standard physical units (Joules) with declared confidence. If a merge mixes incompatible units without a bridging equation, TCL flags it.
Each of the 36 assumption boundaries carries explicit units. If a merge references an assumption whose units don't match the family's dimensional signature, it fails.
Landauer's principle: minimum energy per bit erased = kT ln 2. Dimensional bridge between information (bits) and energy (Joules). Any information-energy merge must respect this bound.

symmetry_preservation.description: The merge must not break the geometric symmetry group of either shape.

validators.check: Octahedral symmetry group O_h is the physical basis for the 8-state encoding. Silicon's tetrahedral-octahedral hybrid lattice at 109.47° must be preserved in any merge involving SHAPE.OCTA or SHAPE.TETRA.
Scope conditions define when structural models work vs break. If a merge produces a structural model that fails its own scope conditions, symmetry is broken.

conservation_law_preserved.description: P02 Conservation must hold across the merge boundary.

validators.check: TAF's axioms 1 and 2 are the foundational conservation laws. Any merge that would require violating either axiom is blocked regardless of other gate results.
Verdict pipeline: parse → constrain → check → flag → score. Final verdict CLEAN = conservation preserved. SUSPECT = review needed. CORRUPTED = merge blocked.
Data processing inequality: output ≤ input × 1.01. No-free-lunch: learning requires data (min 0.01 bits). Shannon noise bound: accuracy ≤ 1 - (noise × 0.5).
KNOWN_LOOPS (8 feedback systems) define which amplification cascades exist. A merge that creates a new amplification pathway not in KNOWN_LOOPS needs explicit validation.

verdict_mapping.description: How PhysicsGuard's 3-tier verdict maps to Rosetta's merge status

CLEAN.meaning: Conservation laws preserved. Family is co-primary on both shapes. Equations valid in both contexts.

SUSPECT.meaning: Possible conservation issue. Family activates through the shape but is not co-primary. Requires further validation or human review.

CORRUPTED.meaning: Conservation law violated. Merge is explicitly blocked. See merge_policy.blocked_merges in family_map.json.

cross_repo_equation_alignment.description: How the three repos' equations align with each other — proving they form a consistent physics stack

alignments.TAF: Axiom 1: No organism can output more than it takes in
alignments.PG: first_law_thermodynamics: lhs must equal rhs (delta < tolerance)
alignments.consistency: All three express dU = Q - W in their respective domains. TAF applies to organisms, PG validates claims, ESP audits planetary energy budget. Same law, three scopes.

alignments.PG: second_law_thermodynamics: entropy of isolated system never decreases
alignments.ESP: cascade_engine KNOWN_LOOPS: feedback loops are entropy-producing dissipative structures
alignments.consistency: TAF measures waste accumulation. PG flags entropy reversal claims. ESP models dissipative feedback cascades. Same 2nd law, three scopes.

alignments.TAF: Axiom 5: Measurement Over Narrative (information must come from measurement, not cultural labels)
alignments.PG: Landauer: erasing 1 bit costs kT ln 2. DPI: output ≤ input. NFL: learning requires data.
alignments.ESP: assumption_validator: each boundary has explicit units and confidence levels — information has physical cost
alignments.consistency: TAF demands measurement over narrative. PG enforces information-theoretic bounds. ESP validates assumptions carry explicit uncertainty. Information is not free in any of them.

alignments.TAF: Axiom 3: Organisms expend energy maintaining predictive models; turbulent environments inflate prediction costs
alignments.PG: contrapositive_tester: four-corner semantic validation tests prediction against its own negation
alignments.ESP: assumption_validator/monitors.py: time-series drift detection flags when assumptions deviate from observations
alignments.consistency: TAF models prediction cost. PG tests prediction validity. ESP monitors prediction drift. The prediction error budget must balance across all three.

alignments.TAF: Axiom 4: Framework applies identically to biological and mechanical systems
alignments.PG: scope_conditions: verdicts are context-dependent but physics is substrate-independent
alignments.ESP: 7 layers treat EM fields, atmosphere, oceans, and biosphere with the same conservation equations
alignments.consistency: Rosetta's entity namespaces (ANIMAL, CRYSTAL, SHAPE) are governed by the same families regardless of substrate. TAF's organism agnosticism IS Rosetta's design philosophy.
